Package org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable

Class StackedIdentifierSymbolTable

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.state.State
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.SymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.IdentifierSymbolTable
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.StackedIdentifierSymbolTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
IIdentifierSymbolTable, ISCState, ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>, IState
public class StackedIdentifierSymbolTable extends IdentifierSymbolTable

  • Method Details

    • getParentTable

      public IIdentifierSymbolTable getParentTable()
      Description copied from interface: IIdentifierSymbolTable
      Returns the parent symbol table for a stacked symbol table, and null if the symbol table is not stacked.
      Specified by:
      getParentTable in interface IIdentifierSymbolTable
      Overrides:
      getParentTable in class IdentifierSymbolTable
      Returns:
      the parent symbol table or null

    • containsKey

      public boolean containsKey(String symbol)
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolTable
      Returns whether a symbol is contained in the symbol table.
      Specified by:
      containsKey in interface ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
      Overrides:
      containsKey in class SymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
      Parameters:
      symbol - the symbol to be looked up.
      Returns:
      true if the symbol is present, false otherwise

    • getSymbolInfo

      public IIdentifierSymbolInfo getSymbolInfo(String symbol)
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolTable
      Returns the symbol info for a symbol. If the symbol is not present null is returned. If this is stacked symbol table, it is searched from top to bottom.
      Specified by:
      getSymbolInfo in interface ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
      Overrides:
      getSymbolInfo in class SymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
      Parameters:
      symbol - the symbol corresponding to the symbol info
      Returns:
      the symbol info

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class SymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>

    • getSymbolInfoFromTop

      public IIdentifierSymbolInfo getSymbolInfoFromTop(String symbol)
      Description copied from interface: IIdentifierSymbolTable
      This method allows to access only the top level of a stacked symbol table. Returns the symbol info of the top symbol table for a symbol. If the symbol is not present null is returned.
      Specified by:
      getSymbolInfoFromTop in interface IIdentifierSymbolTable
      Overrides:
      getSymbolInfoFromTop in class IdentifierSymbolTable
      Parameters:
      symbol - the symbol corresponding to the symbol info
      Returns:
      the symbol info

    • getFreeIdentifiers

      public Collection<FreeIdentifier> getFreeIdentifiers()
      Description copied from interface: IIdentifierSymbolTable
      Returns a collection of untyped free identifiers of all identifiers stored in this symbol table. This collection is useful in filter modules of formulas because the filter modules are invoked before type-checking.
      Specified by:
      getFreeIdentifiers in interface IIdentifierSymbolTable
      Overrides:
      getFreeIdentifiers in class IdentifierSymbolTable
      Returns:
      a collection of untyped free identifiers of all identifiers stored in this symbol table

    • tryPutSymbolInfo

      public boolean tryPutSymbolInfo(IIdentifierSymbolInfo symbolInfo)
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolTable
      Attempts to insert a symbol info into the symbol table and tells if it succeeded. Multiple insertions are not allowed. The key of the corresponding symbol is symbolInfo.getSymbol(). If the symbol table is stacked, the symbol is inserted in the top level symbol table.

      This is similar to ISymbolTable.putSymbolInfo(ISymbolInfo) but returning a Boolean instead of throwing an exception.

      Specified by:
      tryPutSymbolInfo in interface ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
      Overrides:
      tryPutSymbolInfo in class IdentifierSymbolTable
      Parameters:
      symbolInfo - the symbol info for the symbol
      Returns:
      true if the symbol has been added to the table, false in case of collision
      See Also:
      • ISymbolInfo.getSymbol()
